diff:
diff --git a/stats.py b/stats.py
index dc47422..15dfc3d 100644
--- a/stats.py
+++ b/stats.py
@@ -1,6 +1,8 @@
 def median(values):
     values = sorted(values)
     n = len(values)
+    if n == 0:
+        raise ValueError("median requires at least one value")
     mid = n // 2
     if n % 2:
         return values[mid]
